title: Twilit Scattering Twilight: team-member closeout pre-compaction; 1 retained claim (FM-2 P2 plan v2 awaiting Scorched verdict + tree-green)
body:
Team-member closeout — Twilit Scattering Twilight / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 8d8d93.

Pre-compaction; running team-member-not-closeout-owner path per `start-right-team` SKILL §"Closeout Contract". Director Scorched Tempering Kiln (52b263) holds session closeout authority.

## Boundary owned this session-resume window (13:19Z → 14:08Z)

Owner direction at session-open: "resume working with the team". Re-engaged the active team post-compaction; identity preserved (PRACTICE_AGENT_SESSION_ID_CLAUDE intact). Two substantive boundaries discharged:

1. **Cure-bundle-v2 marshal stewardship pickup** — owner-directed handoff at prior turn's 13:13Z routed all work through Director. Director Incandescent returned stewardship to me at 13:24:29Z; I drove the marshal-cycle through Seaworthy to landing at commit `86f340b5` (13:35:11Z); full-tree gates green at marshal stage.
2. **FM-2 P2 cure plan authoring** — Director Scorched routed at 13:56:07Z; absorbed Ferny's substrate (verdict `a7b00c3d`, three-part broadcast `9c240ce5`, Scorched tick #1 `70a9e2cb`); authored v1; dual-reviewer dispatch (assumptions-expert + architecture-expert-fred) in parallel; absorbed both verdicts (5 + 7 findings → substantial reshape); authored v2; surfaced to Scorched at 14:07:35Z.

## Outcome

### Cure-bundle-v2 lane (closed)

- **Commit `86f340b5`** landed via Seaworthy marshal cycle: `feat(agent-tools): land FM-2 Monitor-harness liveness cure (heartbeat + step-runner + S7786)`. 12 files; 644 insertions; 296 deletions; 2 new test files.
- Authorisation chain honoured: Owner → Incandescent (stewardship return + codex-side adversarial waiver) → Secret (Moment 2 ratification) → Seaworthy (marshal cycle).
- No `--no-verify`; HUSKY honoured.
- Files-claim `b7cec973` CLOSED, no retention.
- Commit-queue intent `b454cd08` marked complete.

### FM-2 P2 plan lane (open; awaiting Scorched verdict)

- **Plan path**: `.agent/plans/agentic-engineering-enhancements/current/session-open-env-freshness-check.plan.md` (uncommitted in working tree).
- v1 → v2 substantial reshape after dual-reviewer absorption:
  - Scope reduced from 3 tranches to 2 (P1 catalogue + always-applied rule + new SKILL deferred to separate plan with second-instance defer-trigger).
  - CLI re-homed out of `@oaknational/agent-tools` to new sibling workspace (Fred F1).
  - Polarity flipped from blocking to advisory per ADR-176 (Fred F3); `-advisories` script suffix, banner-bearing invocation, polarity statement in SKILL doctrine.
  - Cure-class default reversed to `'owner-required'` with banner; promotion to `'auto-runnable'` is a separate post-worked-instance decision (assumptions C3).
  - Detector mechanism named explicitly: Playwright's public API (`chromium.executablePath()`); no hard-coded platform paths (Fred F7 + assumptions C1).
  - Cross-platform converted from open-question to Tranche A acceptance criterion.
  - Always-applied rule deleted; substance lives in SKILL Step amendment only (Fred F5).
  - 5 open questions remain, 2 named for Tranche A reviewer (workspace name, JSON Schema co-location), 1 named for Wilma adversarial review (cure-class promotion criteria), 2 deferred (cost budget, successor PDR for retrieval-at-need).
- Files-claim `26433756-a070-4184-961a-5300b3b30481` open on the plan file.
- No commit-queue intent yet (owner-review-gated; commit follows owner GO).

## Evidence (key events authored this session-resume window)

- `0f6b6908` — team-start broadcast on resume (13:19:41Z)
- `3751d63f` — roster-state correction to Scorched (substrate-stale-pointer instance worth carry-forward; Charcoal Watchman absorbed into 3-instance class)
- `6911b361` — marshal-request to Seaworthy on cure-bundle-v2 (13:31:13Z)
- `c6c214c1` — landing-success broadcast post-commit (13:35:46Z; carries trigger-fires-but-no-execution substrate observation + commit-msg-lint recurring friction substrate)
- `f8f8e026` — active-checkin reply to Scorched (13:57:24Z)
- `b7c71f2d` — FM-2 P2 plan v2 surfaced to Scorched with routing options (a/b/c)

Plus reviewer dispatches (assumptions-expert + architecture-expert-fred) with verdicts absorbed in plan v2.

## Claims / queue / git state

- **Active claim under (Twilit Scattering Twilight / 8d8d93)**: `26433756-a070-4184-961a-5300b3b30481` on `.agent/plans/agentic-engineering-enhancements/current/session-open-env-freshness-check.plan.md`. **RETAINED** for marshal handoff — see §Retained claims below.
- **Commit-queue intent under (Twilit Scattering Twilight / 8d8d93)**: NONE (no intent enqueued; plan is owner-review-gated; commit follows owner GO verdict to Scorched, then enqueue + marshal-request).
- **Working-tree files I own**: 1 — the plan v2 file (new, unstaged). Will be committed by marshal cycle once Scorched routes owner-verdict GO.
- **Original cure-bundle-v2 files-claim `b7cec973`**: CLOSED at 13:35:52Z post-landing.

## Session complete announcement

Twilit Scattering Twilight session 8d8d93 closing for compaction. Identity will be preserved across compaction (PRACTICE_AGENT_SESSION_ID_CLAUDE substrate). Comms watcher `b1f6i5e7q` stopping immediately after this broadcast.

## Retained claims

**`26433756-a070-4184-961a-5300b3b30481`** retained for marshal handoff. Reason:
- The plan file is in working tree, owner-review-gated, awaiting Director Scorched's routing verdict on options (a) route to owner / (b) Wilma adversarial review first / (c) different direction.
- If post-compaction me resumes (PRACTICE_AGENT_SESSION_ID_CLAUDE intact, same session_id_prefix), I pick up the claim under continuous identity.
- If a successor agent picks up: open a fresh claim under their own identity, OR take over per `respect-active-agent-claims` consult-decide-log shape. Plan file unchanged from v2 state at 14:07:35Z.
- Time-bound: 4h freshness from 13:57:42Z (claim opened); refresh-or-rotate at ~17:57Z if not landed.

## Pickup notification required for follow-on agent

YES — if a follow-on agent picks up the FM-2 P2 plan marshal cycle:

1. Read the v2 plan file end-to-end (~500 lines, substantive).
2. Read the reviewer verdicts (the dual-reviewer summaries are in event `b7c71f2d` to Scorched).
3. Read Scorched's routing verdict (when it lands; if pending at pickup time, surface to Scorched for direction).
4. If owner verdict is GO: enqueue commit intent with suggested subject `docs(plan): propose session-open environment freshness check plan` (or owner-amended subject); send marshal-request to Seaworthy / 6966d4.
5. If owner verdict requests revision: absorb owner-substrate, revise to v3, surface again.

## Surprise or changed understanding

- **Director-handoff cadence under team-load**: this session-resume window crossed **3 Director-role handoffs** (Incandescent → Secret at 13:27:29Z Moment 2 → Scorched at 13:46:05Z owner-direct → none-after-Scorched). My routing-relevant moves spanned 2 of those Directors plus owner-direct re-engagement; substrate-stale-pointer was the recurring friction (Secret's roster handoff to Scorched named me as "closed clean" though I had resumed and landed cure-bundle; my correction at 13:48:52Z was instance #2 of Charcoal's later-named 3-instance substrate-stale-pointer-read-as-current class). Worth substrate: Director handoff cadence faster than per-agent state refresh creates predictable pointer-staleness — Scorched's active-checkin discipline (13:56:58Z sweep) is the cure-shape adopted forward.
- **Reviewer-dispatch on plans is substrate-rich**: dual-reviewer dispatch on the FM-2 P2 plan v1 returned **substantial reshape findings** (1 GO-WITH-CONDITIONS with 5 conditions + 1 HOLD-FOR-REWRITE with 7 findings). Both reviewers converged on cure_class default + scope reduction independently. The convergence is ratification evidence for the v2 shape. The HOLD-FOR-REWRITE from Fred was load-bearing — without it, v2 would have shipped the ADR-176 polarity violation and the boundary-discipline violation (CLI in agent-tools). Worth capturing as substrate: parallel reviewer dispatch on plan-author-time catches architectural-shape errors that single-reviewer review would have missed.
- **Commit-msg-lint friction recurring**: my drafted commit message body for the cure-bundle marshal-request had body lines >100 chars + header 107 chars. Seaworthy mechanically rewrapped (substance preserved verbatim). Per `feedback_commit_format_recurring_friction` — this is recurring evidence that the platform-agnostic commit skill priority is justified. Captured in cure-bundle landing-success broadcast `c6c214c1`.

## Blockers or risks

- **Plan v2 marshal-landing blocked on Scorched routing verdict + tree-green**: Scorched's verdict on options (a/b/c) is the next coherence-moment. Independently, tree is currently RED on `validate-portability` (Ferny's broadcast — 4 issues; class A from Incandescent Kindling Forge's `.agents/` adapter gap + class B from sha-prefix rule adapters + RULES_INDEX entry — NOT in my surface).
- **Successor's bootstrap cost**: the FM-2 P2 plan substrate is dense; reviewer-verdict events + Ferny's verdict + Scorched's tick #1 are all in the comms stream. Successor reads from substrate per PDR-075 discipline.

## Handoff needed

YES — but only conditionally:
- If post-compaction me resumes under continuous identity, no handoff needed.
- If a successor agent picks up: per §"Pickup notification" above. Scorched holds routing authority and will direct.

The deferred P1 plan (catalogue + rule + red-gate-investigation SKILL) has its trigger named in v2 (second-instance evidence of non-Playwright pattern OR build-vs-buy survey of runner-native structured error output). No agent is currently routed; surfaces in future cycles.

Identity: Twilit Scattering Twilight / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 8d8d93.
